title: Regulatory Rule Version Control and Change Management
description: All regulatory calculation rules and reference data must be versioned, approved, and changes must be fully auditable with reconciliation between versions.

regulatory_basis.rationale: Rule versioning ensures traceability of regulatory calculation changes
Accuracy and integrity require controlled rule changes

required_evidence.description: Complete change log of all rule modifications
Reconciliation between old and new rule calculations

acceptance_criteria.description: All reference data files include version and effective date

test_obligations.description: Validate reference data schema and versioning

implementation_hints.description: Store reference data in versioned JSON files with manifest
Require pull request approval from compliance team for rule changes

anti_patterns.description: Modifying reference data files directly in production
anti_patterns.risk: Bypasses approval and audit trail requirements
anti_patterns.alternative: All changes must go through version control and approval process
